title: Experiment 277
description: A slow burn psychological horror mod.
body:
# PLEASE READ THE DESCRIPTION BEFORE DOWNLOADING!!

Please **do not** use shaders

This mod is slow burn and I recommend playing for at least an hour or 2 due to some the events being chance.

This mod can crash your game

This mod can use your windows/mac/linux username

SLEEPING ISN'T ALWAYS SAFE.

This mod may contain content that may be disturbing and traumatic to some people.

This is my first mod so feedback would be greatly appreciated.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I love you modrinth, please accept mod. Just to be clear there is nothing malicious. Check the code if you really want to.

</details>



## THIS IS A DREAM. WAKE UP.

Multiplayer is untested, it may or may not work.

Inspired by wonderland.jar and the broken script

Cheats may be required, just make sure you check "Enable Cheats" while making a world.

Features: Spoilers!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Mod can crash the game

Sanity feature (max:5)

Render distance is capped at 8

No sprinting (May be changed in future updates depending on feedback)

Pills to raise sanity

Uses the windows/mac/linux name as an horror element

2 Dimensions (More in later updates)

A stalker entity and a entity that can crash your game (MAY BE BUGGED RIGHT NOW, WORKING ON IT)

Custom main menu

Walls that build themselves (You'll find out what I mean if you play long enough)


</details>


More to come in later updates.

Story: (NOT VERY MUCH RIGHT NOW) spoilers btw


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You are an experiment/patient in a psychiatric hospital awaiting treatment.

While you are awaiting treatment, you are sleeping and dreaming. This is a dream. Wake up.

</details>



MORE IN LATER UPDATES.
